required_preferences.fact: Resumes Thursday site visits, but only for funder-required presentations and evaluations—other site visits remain suspended due to internal priorities

supersedes.fact: Suspends regular Thursday site visits in order to prioritize on-site crisis management, grant strategy sessions, and urgent internal meetings after the budget shortfall

required_preferences.fact: Blocks off Mondays for urgent internal reassignments and team briefings following staff departures—schedules strategic planning sessions irregularly, after gap coverage needs are addressed

supersedes.fact: Blocks off Mondays for strategic planning after all-hands meetings—never schedules external calls until the afternoon

required_preferences.fact: Reviews all digital site visit records immediately after visits to ensure audit readiness and correct documentation
Spends late afternoons drafting staff update memos and personally communicating difficult budget news—avoids delegating these sensitive conversations during the funding crisis
Prepares detailed outcome summary slide decks for funder visits, ensuring every metric is cross-checked with team leads ahead of external presentations
Begins each day by preparing coffee and reading headlines—never checks work email before breakfast

persona: A mid-career nonprofit director managing grant agreements and partnerships
